title: Imports Control (Prohibition of Importation of Mirungi) Order, 1974
title_en: Imports Control (Prohibition of Importation of Mirungi) Order, 1974

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Imports Control (Prohibition of Importation of Mirungi) Order.

With immediate effect the importation into Mainland Tanzania of Mirungi or Miraa is hereby prohibited absolutely.
